viewerQuestion: How do you brief Deep Research so it produces a decision-ready answer instead of a pile of sources?
centralThesis: A strong research request connects one decision to a scoped question, an explicit research plan, a source and evidence standard, visible gaps, and a concrete deliverable; the reusable output is a six-field Decision-Ready Research Brief.

P0: Research must end in an auditable decision-ready deliverable, not source collection
The six-field brief is the reusable method
P3Removed: Repeated prompt examples that do not add a new method

chapters.label: Introduction
chapters.promise: Replace the source pile with a path from question to evidence to decision

chapters.label: Decision First
chapters.promise: Tie the research to one audience, decision, and usable output

chapters.label: Research Plan
chapters.promise: Turn the question into scoped sub-questions, sources, and evaluation criteria

chapters.label: Evidence Standard
chapters.promise: Make consequential claims traceable and source quality visible

chapters.label: Missing & Limits
chapters.promise: Surface unknowns, contradictions, and confidence before they distort the decision

chapters.label: Research Brief
chapters.promise: Combine six fields into a reusable brief and targeted follow-up loop

chapters.label: Summary
chapters.promise: Use the brief to turn evidence into an auditable next action

visualSemantics.humanRole: sets the decision, scope, and acceptance boundary
visualSemantics.agentRole: plans, searches, evaluates, cites, flags gaps, and produces the brief
visualSemantics.artifact: one research brief clipboard moving from question to decision

factBoundaries: The source is practical guidance, not experimental evidence
Deep Research does not guarantee correctness
Citations must be paired with source-quality judgment
A missing result is not proof of absence

contentEdit.keptEvidence: All P0/P1 and every P2 item that establishes credibility, mechanism, boundary, or transfer
contentEdit.removedOnly: Repeated examples and navigation details with no additional fact, boundary, step, or understanding value
